recommendations.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
recommendations.overview: Plagued by a violent recurring nightmare, college student Stefanie heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

recommendations.title: Dead Rising: Watchtower
recommendations.overview: A group of people fight to survive in a zombie infested town.

recommendations.genres: Family, Action, Adventure, Comedy, TV Movie

recommendations.title: Leprechaun: Origins
recommendations.overview: Two young couples backpacking through Ireland discover that one of Ireland's most famous legends is a terrifying reality.

recommendations.title: Run
recommendations.overview: Chloe, a teenager who is confined to a wheelchair, is homeschooled by her mother, Diane. Chloe soon becomes suspicious of her mother and begins to suspect that she may be harboring a dark secret.

recommendations.title: Monster High 2
recommendations.overview: As they enter sophomore year at Monster High, Clawdeen Wolf, Draculaura and Frankie Stein face new students, new powers, and an even bigger threat that could not only tear their friendship apart but could change the world forever.

recommendations.title: Cobweb

recommendations.title: Kill Switch
recommendations.overview: A pilot battles to save his family and the planet after an experiment for unlimited energy goes wrong.
